title: magnolia cattienensis
intro: Magnolia cattienensis is a plant species in the Magnoliaceae family, native to Vietnam, and is also known as the Cattie's Magnolia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Vietnamese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bark and leaves of Magnolia cattienensis contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Magnolia cattienensis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
